meaning: n.盐基性红色染料,番红精
examples: Hematoxylin and eosin staining and safranin o staining were used to observe the secretion of cartilage matrix.
Safranin o staining showed strong positive reaction, suggested that there were rich glycosaminoglycan in matrix.
Gram negative bacteria (e. g. Cyanobacteria) are decolorized, and may be counterstained with other dyes, such as safranin, carbol fuchsin, neutral red.
